description_long: This is a modern, freestanding shelving unit with a dark wood finish and gold metal supports, featuring two horizontal shelves. The upper shelf displays a set of decorative vases in blue, white, and red, as well as two stacked plates. The lower section contains a mix of books, a small box, and a sliding door with a textured gray panel, partially concealing additional storage space. The shelving unit is accompanied by a large potted plant with broad green leaves in a round, gray stone planter. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors or semi-public spaces such as lobbies or waiting areas. The combination of open and closed storage, along with decorative items, gives the piece both functional and aesthetic appeal.
description: A modern dark wood and metal shelving unit with open and closed storage, decorated with vases, plates, books, and a large potted plant beside it.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the shelving unit, with plates and vases on top and the potted plant behind.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open shelves with books, boxes, vases, plates, and the large potted plant to the right.
description_view_2: Rear side view dominated by the potted plant, with only the edge of the shelving unit visible.
description_view_3: Back view of the shelving unit, showing the plain rear panel and the potted plant to the left.
